name: github-actions
description: GitHub Actions CI/CD configuration for Salesforce DX with SFDX auth and automated deployments
setup: Configure SFDX_AUTH_URL as a GitHub repository secret

defaultWorkflows.validate: Validate source on PR to develop
defaultWorkflows.deploy-staging: Deploy to staging on merge to develop
defaultWorkflows.deploy-production: Deploy to production on merge to main
defaultWorkflows.run-tests: Run Apex tests and LWC Jest tests
